violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Ground beef and whole cut beef stacked together in the refrigerator. Facility manager separated them.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Consumer self-service sign was not posted where needed or as required. -Need sign on the salad bar telling customers to use a clean plate.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw hamburger above cooked bacon and seafood in the refrigerator.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
